meaning: n.鎴愮儹,瀹屽,(绁ㄦ嵁)鍒版湡,鎴愮啛
examples: Girls generally reach sexual maturity two years earlier than boys.
If you bought that Singapore bond, holding it to maturity might be a bad idea.
Here, as elsewhere, recently promoted principal dancer Chase Finlay shone with ever-increasing maturity and charisma.
